query: rogue trader unauthorized derivatives options loss bank investigation report

results.title: Societe Generale reports EUR 4.9 billion loss from unauthorized trading
results.content: Societe Generale said on January 24, 2008 that a single futures trader had built massive unauthorized positions in European equity index derivatives, concealed through fictitious offsetting trades, leading to a loss of about 4.9 billion euros once the positions were unwound.

results.title: AMF sanction decision concerning Societe Generale internal controls
results.content: The French market regulator reviewed the internal control weaknesses that allowed the unauthorized positions to remain undetected.

results.title: What every options trader can learn from the Kerviel affair
results.content: A blogger's reflection on lessons for retail options traders.
